strengths: Significantly exceeds 6+ year requirement with 17+ years of software development across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TypeScript and Node.js background demonstrated across multiple production roles, including current Staff position
Proven full-stack capability with extensive frontend, backend, and mobile development experience
concerns: Nest.js completely absent from resume despite being PRIMARY backend stack requirement—no framework-specific Node.js expertise evidenced
React experience minimal (single passing mention at Optilyz) versus extensive Ember.js background; raises skill recency risk for 2025 frontend work
Specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not documented; resume shows TDD methodology but not the explicitly required tools
response.justification: Bogdan brings substantial experience and solid TypeScript/Node.js fundamentals, but the resume presents material framework and tooling deficits: Nest.js is entirely absent despite being primary backend stack; React is minimally represented with one mention versus extensive Ember.js work, raising skill recency concerns; and specific testing frameworks (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) lack documentation. These represent concrete technology gaps requiring ramp-up in the core stack rather than transferable skills.
